Title: Sweet Punishment: I'm the Guard's Personal Pet
Actors: Marie Miyake, Hoshino Kazuma, Sachi Yun
Plot: The story is set in a prison in the near future. It revolves around Saotome Hina, imprisoned despite her innocence, and the elegant yet sadistic guard Miyoujin Aki. Hina's heart and body are at the mercy of Myojin's "heartless yet...
